case_title: TEGSCO LLC VS. APRIL NATALIE MORAN REZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TEGSCO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN REZA, APRIL NATALIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN REZA, APRIL NATALIE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $198.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,698.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY TEGSCO LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $148. SERVED AUG-25-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN REZA, APRIL NATALIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
